name: openpowers
description: OpenSpec plus Superpowers Lite workflow guard for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: OpenSpec work guarded by Superpowers Lite discipline.
interface.longDescription: OpenPowers keeps OpenSpec as the single product specification source while adding lightweight execution discipline for planning, TDD, review, verification, and upgrade audits.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use OpenPowers Lite for this OpenSpec change.
